tool_args.label: Report on Agreements Entered into Directly by the Real Estate Department Pursuant to Board Policies February 2026

payload.title: Report on Agreements Entered into Directly by the Real Estate Department Pursuant to Board Policies February 2026

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: NYCT License Agreement - Jason Forrest - Lexington Avenue/51st Street Station

payload.description: NYCT License Agreement with licensee Jason Forrest at NYCT's Lexington Avenue/51st Street Station - Unit 2. Use of a retail unit for the installation, maintenance, and display of artwork. Term: One (1) year. Compensation: None. Transaction Manager: Ray Smyth.

tool_args.label: NYCT First Amendment to Restroom Facilities Agreement - Loula Coffee Shop Inc.

payload.description: NYCT First Amendment to Restroom Facilities Agreement with Permittor: Loula Coffee Shop Inc. at 169-23 Jamaica Avenue, Jamaica, NY 11432. Use of restroom facilities for MTA bus drivers and employees. Term: One (1) year term, with automatic one-year renewals. Compensation: $300 per month. Transaction Manager: Ray Smyth.

tool_args.label: NYCT License Agreement - Queens Ballpark Company LLC - South Field Parking Lot

payload.description: NYCT License Agreement with Licensor: Queens Ballpark Company LLC at 126-01 Roosevelt Avenue, Corona, NY 11368. Use of portions of South Field Parking Lot for construction staging to support track panel installation. Term: One (1) month. Compensation: None. Transaction Manager: Arturo Espinoza.

tool_args.label: MNR Lease Agreement - Yono Grand Central, LLC - Grand Central Terminal Dining Concourse LC-9

payload.description: MNR Lease Agreement with Licensee: Yono Grand Central, LLC at Grand Central Terminal - Dining Concourse LC-9. License agreement for the retail sale of fresh high-quality sushi. Term: 3 Years with 3% annual escalations. Year 1 Rent: $100,000.00, Year 2: $103,000.00, Year 3: $106,090.00. Transaction Manager: Danielle M. Gaudio.

tool_args.label: MNR Lease Agreement - Barberino NY LLC - Grand Central Terminal Lexington Passage MC-79

payload.description: MNR Lease Agreement with Licensee: Barberino NY LLC at Grand Central Terminal - Lexington Passage MC-79. Lease agreement for the retail sale of luxury men's grooming brand products. Term: 5 Years with 3% annual escalations. Transaction Manager: Danielle M. Gaudio. Also includes sub-lease information for Dr Kirshchner and Two Kids and a Dog.
